attributes.action: Reform Buyer Beware to Protect Homebuyers from Hidden & Unsafe Property Defects
attributes.additional_details: The current system leaves buyers unprotected from hidden or concealed defects, including when sellers mask problems with cosmetic work to secure a quick sale. Buyers can be left with unsafe homes, no support from lenders, and no effective redress. Reform is needed to ensure transparency, accountability, and fair remedies when sellers or professionals fail.
attributes.background: Reform “buyer beware” by creating a legal duty for sellers to fully disclose defects, including issues a reasonable seller should know, and prevent concealment through cosmetic repairs. Strengthen accountability for surveyors and lenders when homes are unsafe

rejection.details:
Reform legal processes to protect homebuyers
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762131
